ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reading_challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading challenge */,
  "challenge_level" TEXT /* Grade level or category of the challenge (e.g., K-2, 3-4) */,
  "total_books_required" INTEGER /* Total number of books that must be read */,
  "min_prc_books" INTEGER /* Minimum number of PRC books required */,
  "max_personal_choice_books" INTEGER /* Maximum number of Personal Choice books allowed */,
  "booklists_available" TEXT /* List of available booklists for the challenge */,
  "challenge_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the challenge */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Educator who created the challenge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_challenges_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student (e.g., K, 1, 2, ...) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the student account */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Classroom the student is in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the student's profile picture */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_challenges" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student participating in the challenge */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading challenge */,
  "books_read" INTEGER /* Number of books read by the student */,
  "prc_books_read" INTEGER /* Number of PRC books read by the student */,
  "personal_choice_books_read" INTEGER /* Number of Personal Choice books read by the student */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student's challenge progress */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student's participation in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_challenges_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES reading_challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_challenges_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booklists" (
  "booklist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booklist */,
  "booklist_name" TEXT /* Name of the booklist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the booklist */,
  "grade_range" TEXT /* Range of grade levels the booklist is suitable for */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Educator who created the booklist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booklist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booklist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booklists_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "booklist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booklist the book belongs to */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_booklist_id FOREIGN KEY ("booklist_id") REFERENCES booklists ("booklist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review provided by the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., from 1 to 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "educator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the educator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the educator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the educator account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the educator */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the educator's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the educator account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "badge_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the badge image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_badges" (
  "student_badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the student-badge relationship */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who earned the badge */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge earned */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_badges_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES badges ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_badges_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the requirement belongs to */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., total_books, prc_books, personal_choice_books) */,
  "requirement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the requirement (e.g., 30, 20, 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_requirements_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES reading_challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_booklists" (
  "external_booklist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external booklist */,
  "external_booklist_name" TEXT /* Name of the external booklist */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external booklist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external booklist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the external booklist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_booklist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_books" (
  "external_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external book */,
  "external_booklist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external booklist the book belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_books_external_booklist_id FOREIGN KEY ("external_booklist_id") REFERENCES external_booklists ("external_booklist_id")
)
